preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes:
v1.8.0: Competitor ad intelligence via Foreplay global discovery. New `competitor_spy` MCP tool pulls ads for any brand worldwide WITHOUT pre-subscribing to them in the Foreplay UI — the agent routes exclusively through /api/brand/getBrandsByDomain, getAdsByBrandId, getAdsByPageId, ad/duplicates, and ad/{id}. Fills the US-coverage gap that Meta Ads Library's EU-only preview restriction leaves open. Supports ad-media download (video/image → results/competitor-ads/<ad_id>.<ext>), ad-duplicate reverse lookup, cursor-based pagination, and credit-usage telemetry. BYOK — user supplies their own `foreplayApiKey` (0.01 credits per ad returned). Rate-limited via PreflightCheck (30/min, 500/hr, 5000/day). Bearer key banned from any direct outbound call via block-api-bypass.js — only the binary can touch public.api.foreplay.co. Static-source guards pin the no-Spyder contract (foreplay_test.go:TestForeplayOnlyGlobalDiscoveryEndpoints) — a future refactor that routes through /api/spyder/* fails the build.

v1.7.0: The big UX + resilience release. OAuth tokens now auto-refresh across every platform on a 4-hour Electron watchdog heartbeat plus a per-platform refresh loop in the Go core — no more reconnect every time a token expires. Every brand remembers its own conversation thread and paints prior history on reopen instead of a blank welcome. Morning briefing card summarizes ad performance, content, revenue, and a recommended next move at session start. Starter chips on both new and returning flows, Undo toast for ad kills, image-only Share, Ctrl/Cmd+D mic toggle, Ctrl/Cmd+S narrate-last, Lavender Pearl light mode with a titlebar sun/moon toggle, branded purple/green ad placeholders replacing the old gray broken-image stub, Stripe read-only revenue reporting, Reddit organic prospecting with a 7-layer compliance preflight, streaming TTS (first spoken word in ~400-700ms vs 2-3s), and a SaaS-grade rubric upgrade across every skill. Cold-start warmup is parallelized and pre-warms the SDK subprocess in the background so first-message latency drops from ~1-3s cold to immediate. Dashboard JSON parses are cached on the async hot path. Shopify now requests write_content and surfaces scope gaps as a reconnect prompt instead of a raw 403. Google Ads tiles stay green reliably across disconnect/reconnect cycles. Auto-claim referral on first launch. Under the hood: skill-routing migration from monolithic prose routers to 8 SKILLs loaded on demand (~53 KB off the cold-start context), monthly audit fail-loud on missing secrets, CI asar size ceiling, rate-limit preflight hardening via NextSlotNano, hook blocklist atomic-write siblings, framework-file protection so skill descriptions can't be hot-rewritten mid-session. Wisdom-api migrations now run once per isolate instead of per request.
whatsNew: Spy on any competitor's ads — no manual subscribing.
Each brand remembers its own chat. Reopen, resume.
Morning briefing: yesterday's wins + today's next move.
